This item can be used in tradeskills.
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Quest Item Placeable

This item can be used in tradeskills.

Race: ALL

Guru
186 posts
Merchant Wen'Las in CR Crescent Reach sells these. He is near Librarian Hemfar but in the center area.
▲ Page top
Sold by Wen'Lar in CR
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2022 at 11:42 AM Rating: Good
Atlans
Sage
105 posts
FYI - It is actually Merchant Wyn'Las
▲ Page top
Tutorial
QuoteReply
# Jul 26 2012 at 8:46 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1606695542730
Scholar
20 posts
You need a fire beetle eye for a level 3 ranger spell, Flame Lick. At level 3 you are most likely in the tutorial. Yet, this item does not drop from any of the mobs in the tutorial nor have I found it on a vendor. You can run to CR to buy one, but it would be nice if SoE would make one available in the tutorial either on a mob or on a vendor....
▲ Page top
Vendor Buyable
QuoteReply
# Feb 23 2012 at 9:08 AM Rating: Good
Tutankamenzek
Sage
61 posts
This item can be Vendor Purchased:

Crescent Reach
Merchant Wyn`las @ -1404, -1520, -88
▲ Page top
Misty Thicket drops
QuoteReply
# Sep 17 2009 at 5:16 PM Rating: Good
RhinoNY
Scholar
20 posts
Klaknak Warriors in Misty THicket drop this as well, not just the prince/princess.
▲ Page top
North Qeynos is the new East Commonlands...
QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2006 at 8:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258988162
304 posts
My ranger was hunting for these for my newbie druid. I started in East Commonlands, which has always been fire beetle central. I tracked zero fire beetles, zero large fire beetles and only 1 giant fire beetle in the whole zone.

I checked allakhazam for other zones they appeared in. So I hiked it to North Qeynos. Voila! I tracked about a half dozen in the first few minutes, and walked away with about 4 fire beetle eyes.

It looks like North Qeynos is the new source for the eyes.

Good hunting!
▲ Page top
Research
QuoteReply
# Mar 17 2006 at 4:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591869496105
56 posts
I have to use this in my research for spells. To make the practice ruins for my necro. I have been having a hard time getting a lot of them at one time. What is the best zone to go to, so I can farm them?

l33tness
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2003 at 4:38 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759875334
56 posts
OH WHY SONY!?!?

I have spent the past 3 days looking for just ONE of these!! I must have killed atleast 1000 Spiderlings looking for this! WHY!? Why must they make everything so rare that only SUPER RICH MULTI - PLATNIUM PEICE people have it!? I WANT MY EDIBLE GOO!!! Where do I go to sign up for EQ Wellfare?

Homeless in Qeynos,

Dheque

Edited, Sun Sep 28 17:25:03 2003
▲ Page top
RE: l33tness
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2003 at 5:39 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592256700437
Scholar
164 posts
Try killing a fire beetle. Spiderlings don't have 'fire beetle eyes". They have spiderling eyes. If you go to N. Qeynos in the yard you will probably find several rotting. You will probably find some for sale on a merchant near the newbie area.

Edited, Sun Sep 28 18:42:55 2003
▲ Page top
Feerrott Fire Beetles
QuoteReply
# May 19 2003 at 3:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1688948237917
View User Forum
236 posts
Yes, fire beetle eyes, made my day light up in my second range slot, Shadow Knight Ogre Rallos Zek deity.
▲ Page top
Need to buy??
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2002 at 9:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255656562
6 posts
Another location to buy this is Misty Thicket. There is a vender just before you enter Rivervale in one of the huts that sell this item.
▲ Page top
Rangers Take Note
QuoteReply
# Sep 07 2002 at 8:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1618187081631
View User Forum
Scholar
55 posts
This item is also used by Rangers (once they can cast spells, that is). It's a component for the Flame Lick spell, which is a very minor DoT with a slight debuff to, I believe, AC. I use this spell constantly. It's great for making it easier to hit mobs that I seem to have trouble hitting for one reason or another.

Also, as a very young player in the game, especially in one of the newbie zones that has fire beetles, this makes an admirable free lightsource. (Generally you can find a fire beetle body that someone has simply left laying on the ground unlooted and get an eye early on.) I always used them until I could kill a wisp for a lightstone or afford to buy one.

▲ Page top
RE: Rangers Take Note
QuoteReply
# Sep 08 2002 at 7:24 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591753166398
32 posts
If I'm not mistaken, a fire beetle eye is also needed for the later spell upgrade to Flame Lick. Immolate? I think that's what it's called. I haven't played my ranger in a good long time.
▲ Page top
RE: Rangers Take Note

# Sep 09 2002 at 10:08 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591765148302

Yes, you need this for Immolate, which I use still,as a 57 ranger.

This is an awesome piece of loot for newbies and a must have for all druids. Sells for several silver which as a newbie is like hundreds of platinum.

yes these are truly good

Yeah I love firebeetle eyes.. used to gather tons of them to sell with my dark elf warrior, and still to this day I usually take a bag of them with me when I am going to GFay so I can have something to give out to all the people who shout.. WTF are Fire Beetle Eyes.

Greatest Item in the game, wooooo! Show me some more of that phat lewt =) Really, at lowbie levels selling these things are big money =) Enough to buy food and water. A lvl 46 druid and i still carry one of these with me. (Immolate =P)
